positive: A whimsical and stylish symmetrical composition featuring a majestic golden retriever puppy dressed as a retro-futuristic astronaut, floating gently amidst swirling nebula clouds and giant bioluminescent flora. The puppy is wearing a detailed, stylized white and gold suit with glowing accents. The composition should have a strong silhouette against a vibrant, deep space background of purples, teals, and warm golds. High contrast, clean lines, vector art influence combined with cinematic watercolor painting style. Perfect for a t-shirt graphic, central and balanced.
negative: blur, noisy, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry details, extra limbs, copyright, celebrity, messy, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts
